title: Doctor Bones Evidence Record
description: Lightweight PFEM-lite evidence record shape. This is not the full PFEM contract.

summary.description: What was observed, without turning it into a finding.

provenance.description: A link, file path, command output, log reference, or human-provided source note.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp or explicit capture date.

x-doctor-bones-contract.boundary_rule: Evidence is source-backed observation, not finding, recommendation, command, execution, or proof.
